SC2-OVERLORD.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: A fragment of our will is granted. Carry it upward.
SC2-OVERLORD.talk.ANY.6-0r.ancient: Failure exists only so that we may succeed.
SC2-OVERLORD.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.anc: The Spire reshapes all things. We will ensure it is for the better.
SC2-OVERLORD.title: Overmind
